system.notes:
Unmanned weapons platform controlled from the ground, with some programmed autonomy and initiative.

Spacecraft code (Deep Space p.35): Battle Sat · 40 · none · none · Chemical · 3 · Batteries, Solar · 65% · 2 · 0m3 · 1 · 10 · 4 · 6 · 2 · none

Decoded (Deep Space p.28 legend): Cost 40 million eb; Crew none; Passengers none; Drive Type Chemical; Burn Elements 3; Power Type Batteries, Solar; Sensors 65%; Computers 2; Cargo 0m3; Actions 1; Weapon Spaces 10; Armor (max SP) 4; Damage Points 6; Overkill Points 2; Shuttlecraft none.

Speed is not part of the Deep Space spacecraft code (drive is rated by Burn Elements, not kph); speed fields left at 0.
